caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a room decorated with framed pictures and clothing racks. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. In the initial scene, he is speaking and smiling. He then raises a red plastic cup to his lips and begins drinking. He continues to hold the cup to his mouth throughout the remaining sequence. On the screen, a logo featuring a circle and the text "DREAM" is visible on the left, and a red logo reading "PROPERLY FIT" appears on the right. The background remains static, showing white t-shirts on mannequins and various framed photographs on the wall behind him.
